channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 yaojingang/GEOFlow (543 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yaojingang

📝 Repository: yaojingang/GEOFlow

📄 Descrizione: Open-source GEO content production system with AI tasks, review workflow, and publishing.

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

]]>

item.title: 🐘 Automattic/wordpress-atmosphere (20 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Automattic

📝 Repository: Automattic/wordpress-atmosphere

📄 Descrizione: ATmosphere connects your WordPress site to the AT Protocol network. When you publish a post, it is automatically cross-posted to Bluesky and registered as a standard.site document on your Personal Data Server (PDS).

⭐ Stelle: 20

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: at-protocol atmosphere atproto bluesky bsky plugin standard-site wordpress wordpress-plugin

item.title: 🐘 Maxiz88/laravel-eloquent-guard (19 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Maxiz88

📝 Repository: Maxiz88/laravel-eloquent-guard

📄 Descrizione: Is a lightweight, production-ready runtime performance monitor for Laravel. It detects N+1 queries and slow database operations as they happen, helping you keep your application fast and efficient

⭐ Stelle: 19

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: eloquent laravel mysql n-plus-1 n-plus-one n-plus-one-detection n-plus-one-problem postgresql slow-queries slow-query-logs sql

📜 Licenza: MIT License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-02T12:13:11Z
